title: Independent reproduction and third-party adoption evidence

preflight.note: Stamped by `repopact new`; the work item was recorded before implementation began.

acceptance_criteria.text: The existing Flask adoption is published as a reproducible script or fixture with exact source revision, commands, expected records, validation result, and cleanup boundaries so an independent party can rerun F-009 without private local state.

At least one public reproduction or adopter is executed and reported by a person or organization outside ForgeWireLabs, with immutable source and result links and provenance that distinguishes their execution from author-run evidence.

The reproduction path includes the packaged RepoPact version, conformance or repository validation, encountered friction, and disconfirming observations; unsuccessful or partial attempts remain visible rather than being filtered from the evidence base.
Paper threats T1 and T2 and the findings register are updated to state exactly what the independent result mitigates and what single-operator, domain, and scale limitations remain.
